mapper.sql: record_id, user_id, sport_id, sport_name, record_time, duration_min, calories_kcal, note, data_source, external_id, created_time, last_change_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_exercise_record ( user_id, sport_id, sport_name, record_time, duration_min, calories_kcal, note, data_source, external_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sportId}, #{sportName}, #{recordTime}, #{durationMin}, #{caloriesKcal}, #{note}, #{dataSource}, #{externalId} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_exercise_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND data_source = 'import'
mapper.update: UPDATE t_exercise_record SET sport_id = #{sportId}, sport_name = #{sportName}, record_time = #{recordTime}, duration_min = #{durationMin}, calories_kcal = #{caloriesKcal}, note = #{note}, data_source = #{dataSource}, external_id = #{externalId} WHERE record_id = #{recordId} AND user_id = #{userId}
